originalBehavior: The published filter lesson boots the Learning Synths shell and uses an XY control to reshape the filter response in real time.
localStatus: The local route keeps that filter lesson shell and XY runtime under the route tree while moving provenance to the shared footer.
notes: The archive preserves the published filter scene rather than rebuilding it in a custom control layer.
Local chapter links are rewritten after mount so the shipped synth family stays internally navigable.
evidence: Music smoke coverage verifies local script loading and the filter-scene update path on the shipped route.
The public route keeps footer-only provenance and strips upstream lesson chrome from the body.

originalBehavior: The published filter lesson relies on the same shared Learning Synths fonts, text payloads, RNBO patch data, and helper assets as the rest of the site.
localStatus: The local route archives that shared inventory under its own tree so the filter lesson can run without remote media dependencies.
notes: The archived inventory matches the rest of the shipped Learning Synths batch.
Route-local assets stay on relative paths for GitHub Pages subpath hosting.
evidence: Music smoke coverage asserts the expected local asset counts before the filter interaction checks begin.
The no-remote-playable-media smoke guard stays clean after lesson boot and interaction.

originalBehavior: The published lesson updates the filter curve and synth response as the XY control moves across cutoff and resonance space.
localStatus: The local route keeps that filter curve scene and note-trigger path while serving the lesson entirely from archived assets.
notes: The filter curve scene is treated as parity-critical because it is the clearest demonstration in the lesson.
The route keeps the published lesson structure instead of collapsing the scene into a standalone demo.
evidence: Music smoke coverage verifies the filter curve path changes, the macro values update, and the route enters the active note state during the interaction.
Responsive checks keep the filter lesson usable on narrow viewports under the local archive shell.
